parameters.name: renderinput
parameters.label: Render/RenderPass TOP
parameters.description: The network path to the used as input. This parameter can be used as an alternate to connecting a Render or Render Pass to the Render Pass's input connector. Makes it easier to select a render from an

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specifies which to look through when rendering the scene.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.label: Geometry
parameters.description: Specifies which will be included in the rendered scene. You can use to specify objects using patterns. Example: will render all Geometry components whose names start with except .

parameters.name: lights
parameters.label: Lights
parameters.description: Specifies which will be used to render the scene. You can use here as well.

parameters.name: cleardepth
parameters.label: Clear Depth Buffer
parameters.description: Clears the values that are currently in the depth buffer (coming from the that is wired to the input of this node).

parameters.name: transparency
parameters.label: Transparency
parameters.description: Refer to to the same parameter in the help page.

parameters.name: depthpeel
parameters.label: Depth Peel
parameters.description: Refer to to the same parameter in the help page.

parameters.name: transpeellayers
parameters.label: Transparency/Peel Layers
parameters.description: Refer to to the same parameter in the help page.

parameters.name: render
parameters.label: Render
parameters.description: Enables rendering; 1 = on, 0 = off.

parameters.name: dither
parameters.label: Dither
parameters.description: Dithers the rendering to help deal with banding and other artifacts created by precision limitations of 8-bit displays.

parameters.name: coloroutputneeded
parameters.label: Color Output Needed
parameters.description: This is an optimization if you don't actually need the color result from this pass. Turning this off avoids a copy from the offscreen render buffer to the 's texture. When anti-aliasing is enabled tur

parameters.name: drawdepthonly
parameters.label: Draw Depth Only
parameters.description: This will cause the render to only draw depth values to the depth buffer. No color values will be created. To make use of the depth buffer, use the .

parameters.name: allowbufblending
parameters.label: Allow Blending for Extra Buffers
parameters.description: Controls if blending (as enabled by the common page setting) will be enabled for extra buffers beyond the first one. Often the extra buffers are used to write other types of information such as normal

parameters.name: cullface
parameters.label: Cull Face
parameters.description: Front Faces, Back Faces, Both Faces, Neither. Will cause the render to avoid rendering certain polygon faces depending on their orientation to the camera. Refer to for more information.

parameters.name: overridemat
parameters.label: Override Material
parameters.description: This allows you to specific a material that will be applied to every Geometry that is rendered in the Render . It is useful for pre-processing passes where we are outputting infoformation about the ge

parameters.name: polygonoffset
parameters.label: Polygon Depth Offset
parameters.description: This feature pushes the polygons back into space a tiny fraction. This is useful when you are rendering two polygons directly ontop of each other and are experiencing . Refer to for more information.

parameters.name: polygonoffsetfactor
parameters.label: Offset Factor
parameters.description: Refer to to the same parameter in the help page.

parameters.name: polygonoffsetunits
parameters.label: Offset Units
parameters.description: Refer to to the same parameter in the help page.

parameters.name: overdraw
parameters.label: Display Overdraw
parameters.description: This feature visually shows the overdraw in the scene. Refer to the article for more information. In particular the Analyzing Overdraw section.

parameters.name: overdrawlimit
parameters.label: Overdraw Limit
parameters.description: This value quantizes the outputted color value to some # of overdraws. Refer to the for more information.

parameters.name: cropleft
parameters.label: Crop Left
parameters.description: Positions the left edge of the rendered image.

parameters.name: cropleftunit
parameters.label: Crop Left Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: cropright
parameters.label: Crop Right
parameters.description: Positions the right edge of the rendered image.

parameters.name: croprightunit
parameters.label: Crop Right Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: cropbottom
parameters.label: Crop Bottom
parameters.description: Positions the bottom edge of the rendered image.

parameters.name: cropbottomunit
parameters.label: Crop Bottom Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: croptop
parameters.label: Crop Top
parameters.description: Positions the top edge of the rendered image.

parameters.name: croptopunit
parameters.label: Crop Top Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: sampler0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: This is the sampler name that the GLSL program will use to sample from this . The samplers need to be declared as the same dimensions as the (sampler2D for a 2D , sampler3D for 3D ).

parameters.name: sampler0top
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: This is the that will be referenced by the above sampler name above it.

parameters.name: sampler0extendu
parameters.label: Extend U
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: sampler0extendv
parameters.label: Extend V
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: sampler0extendw
parameters.label: Extend W
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: sampler0filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: sampler0anisotropy
parameters.label: Anisotropic Filter
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vec0name
parameters.label: Uniform Name
parameters.description: The uniform name, as declared in the shader.

parameters.name: clearcolor
parameters.label: Clearcolor
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: negsidez
parameters.label: Negsidez
parameters.description: When Render Mode is Cube Map, specify which sides if the cube map are rendered, -X, -Y, or -Z.

parameters.name: possidez
parameters.label: Possidez
parameters.description: When Render Mode is Cube Map, specify which sides if the cube map are rendered, +X, +Y, or +Z.

parameters.name: premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.label: Premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bgcolora
parameters.label: Bgcolora
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: vec0valuew
parameters.label: Vec0Valuew
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
